title: QUESTioned
body:
Please, read [this](https://keepandroidopen.org/) while you can.

---

**QUESTioned** _(~~Yeah I know, cool name~~)_ is an **optimization** modpack for _standalone VR/PCVR/PC_ Minecraft, without changing vanilla behavior.
<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

### Something I want to note :
Many people probably think that making a performance boost modpack is just "Take a bunch of mods and mix them together", well that's kind of true, but the result will be a modpack with 280+ mods that eats all your ram and destroys your performance. **This modpack, instead, was tested and configured in the best way possible to get the most out of your computer. Enjoy (:**

Also please [join my Discord](https://bit.ly/dsas64m). Thank you for reading and thanks to the mods creators.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Warning</summary>

### Warning :
When **opening the game/a world, it may lag**. **Just wait** a bit and it will fix itself.

Or host the world in a server (like Aternos, it's free), since **worldgen is the heavy part**.

(This problem **happens only on _standalone VR headsets_**, not on _PCVR/PC_ !)

**I** also **recommend using** "[The Ocular Migraine](https://github.com/petermg/TheOcularMigraineMCP/releases)" (free) or "[Quest Games Optimizer](https://www.quest-games-optimizer.com/)" ($9.99) **for Meta Quests**, they let you change **various options to improve** the headset **perfomance/quality**, like :

- CPU/GPU Level
- Refresh Rate
- Display resolution (per-eye)
- Fixed Foveated Rendering (FFR)
- And much more ...

**without resetting** after a reboot.

(For example, I use 85hz and 1441×1441 because of the **res limit** [Questcraft](https://questcraft.org/) **has**. On _standalone Meta Quest 2_ I usually get smooth **70-90FPS** using **this modpack with some other mods**)
</details>



---

### Why ?
This modpack was made **because of the lack of computational power required to locally run Minecraft: Java Edition on VR headsets**, like the _Meta Quest 2_. _(And the lack of well made AI-Less performance only modpacks for VR headsets)_

Or, in simpler terms, This_Modpack+Slow_Headset=VROOM

### What ?
**The main focus of this modpack** is offering a **survival** _(~~both IRL and in Minecraft~~)_ **friendly** experience, with the ability to **play smoothly with high render distance.**

### What does this modpack contain ?
This modpack **only contains (tested, configured and working) performance mods, anything else like QoL mods are not included.**

_May contain gluten_.

### What's this modpack hardware target ?
This modpack was mainly made for the **Meta Quest 2, but it can run on other headsets or computers.** In fact, the mods are tested on a desktop and then published to Modrinth.

### Can this modpack run on a normal computer ?
As stated before, **yes it can.** No configuration needed.

---

Want to recommend a mod, or the removal of one ? [join my Discord](https://bit.ly/dsas64m) !

(English is not my main language, in case of any mistake in the description, sorry !)
